name.description: Name of the Maine municipality (city, town, plantation, or unorganized territory) that authorized the formation of a Local Development Corporation under 5 MRSA §13120-B.9. New top-level namespace because the municipality is a governmental authorizing body distinct from the LDC entity itself.

additional_officers_present.description: Boolean opt-in indicating the municipality has more than 5 voting officers and additional names/capacities/signatures are attached as a labeled exhibit. Naming parallels entity.additional_provisions_present / entity.additional_incorporators_exhibit_letter from MBCA-6.

additional_officers_exhibit_letter.description: Letter of the exhibit containing additional municipal officer signatures (paired with municipality.additional_officers_present).

printed_name_and_capacity.description: Indexed roster (1–5 inline) of municipal officers signing the LDC authorization. Each row is a combined name+capacity Shape-D widget. Distinct from officer_N.* (corporate roster), incorporator_N.* (formation originators), and filing.signer.* (single filer) — these are governmental officials voting on behalf of the municipality.

Printed name and capacity of the Municipal Clerk attesting to the duly-called meeting and the recorded vote (e.g., 'Mary Smith, Town Clerk'). Combined Shape-D widget; the Clerk also wet-ink signs above and affixes the municipal seal.
